summary: A short vertical video, posted by a U.S. Border Patrol El Paso account, showing border-wall construction. Handheld footage looks up at a tall stadium-style light pole beside a section of existing mesh fence topped with concertina wire under a clear blue sky, with a partly legible yellow highway sign. Another shot moves along a dirt road beside a newly built tall steel bollard wall section topped with concertina wire, where an armored vehicle and a white pickup are parked. The audio is a music bed.

script.scene: Looking up at a tall light pole beside a mesh border fence topped with concertina wire under a blue sky; a partly legible yellow highway sign at right.
A dirt road runs beside a tall newly built steel bollard wall topped with concertina wire, where an armored vehicle and a white pickup are parked.
